title: Fix PDF Viewer boot crash — duplicate timer declaration (dbg84)
description:
dbg83 introduced a duplicate `let planBoardViewerCanvasRepaintTimer` in app.js, which caused a SyntaxError and blocked PipeSync from loading. Removed the duplicate declaration; cache bust dbg84.

PDF Viewer continuous scroll (dbg83) is otherwise unchanged. Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy.
changeLog: PipeSync boots again; PDF Viewer continuous module can load.
